LeQuality Life — Content Creation & Social Media

LeQuality Life Co., LTD · Kaohsiung, Taiwan · 2022–2024

Social Media Content Creation Brand Storytelling Visual Marketing
Produced social media content and visual marketing assets for LeQuality Life Co., LTD — a Taiwanese lifestyle brand specializing in premium seafood and curated food products. Created photo and video content that conveyed the brand's identity across digital channels and trade show environments.
